message:
refactor(abi): wrap pthread TLS key functions with centralized threading policy guard

Consolidate the sensitive_context conditional handling in four pthread
thread-local storage functions into the new with_threading_policy_guard()
abstraction. Each function now passes two closures — one for the
sensitive-context early-return path and one for the normal execution
path — replacing ad-hoc if/else blocks with a uniform guard pattern.

Affected functions:
- pthread_key_create: TLS key allocation
- pthread_key_delete: TLS key destruction
- pthread_getspecific: TLS value retrieval
- pthread_setspecific: TLS value assignment

This makes the threading policy decision point explicit and auditable
across the entire TLS surface, reducing the risk of inconsistent
sensitive-context handling as new pthread functions are added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
